identity.name: BidBlitz 2.0 - Cyber-Auction Protocol
identity.vibe: High-Frequency Trading meets Cyberpunk Casino. Urgent, Electric, Premium.
principles: Fusion: Trading Terminal density + Casino excitement.
Emotion: Every tick of the clock increases heart rate.
Contrast: Deepest blacks vs. blinding neons.
Depth: Glass layers over data streams.

headings.usage: All section titles, auction timers, prices. Tight tracking (-0.02em).

mono.usage: Transaction hashes, wallet addresses, countdown ms.

borders.tracing_beam: Animated gradient border for active auctions.
borders.neon_glow: Box-shadow with primary color for focused inputs/buttons.

textures.noise: Subtle grain overlay (opacity 0.03) on all backgrounds to prevent banding.
textures.grid: faint hexagonal or pixel grid in hero backgrounds.

grid_system.auctions: Bento Grid: Mix of 1x1 (Standard), 2x1 (Featured), and 2x2 (Hero) cards.
grid_system.dashboard: Dense Grid: High information density, minimal gaps (gap-4).

AuctionCard.style: Glass panel, sharp corners or minimal radius (rounded-md).

elements.bid_button: Full width, pill shape, 'Acid Green' background.

AuctionCard.interaction: Scale up 1.02 on hover, border glows.

BidButton.base: bg-[#D4FF00] text-black font-black uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-white transition-all
BidButton.shape: rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg] (Cyberpunk style) OR rounded-full (Modern). Decision: Rounded-md with slight skew.

Navigation.style: Floating glass bar at bottom (mobile) or top-sticky (desktop).
Navigation.links: Uppercase, small text, glowing underline on active.

animations.pulse_urgent: Keyframe pulse red shadow for timers < 10s.
animations.glitch: Occasional CSS glitch effect on 'BidBlitz' logo.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENT THEME: Update tailwind.config.js with the new 'Acid Green' and 'Obsidian' palette.
2. REFACTOR CARDS: Replace existing auction cards with the new Glassmorphism + Neon Border style.
3. TYPOGRAPHY: Import 'Barlow Condensed' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.css.
4. LAYOUT: Convert the auction list to a responsive Bento Grid (use col-span-2 for featured items).
5. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Add hover states to all buttons. No static elements allowed.
6. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Dark Mode Only: This app is strictly dark mode. Do not implement light mode toggles unless requested.
Accessibility: Ensure neon text has sufficient contrast against black backgrounds.
